reviews.review_title: What Rocksmith should have been! AR/VR!!
reviews.review_description: The note highway in AR is what I have been waiting for since 2014!  The perfect application for this kind of technology.  The real gem here is the ability to pull files from Rocksmith and CustomsForge.  Literally thousands of songs to build a library of what you want to learn to play.  This is a pretty polished app already, and it is still in early access!  It has a growing community on Discord, responsive developers, and huge potential.  Spend the cost of two beers and pick up that dust-gathering, clothes-rack instrument and start playing and learning!

reviews.review_title: The central menu buttons are offset
reviews.review_description:
After the updates, the central menu buttons are off set . when I try to press through my remote controls it doesn’t press the buttons, instead I have to try in different location of the menu panel and press by trying and trying again ￼.

Update, after the app update by this inquiry, the offset has been fixed. I am changing my ratings to 5 as the app itself is very good.

If you have a Quest 3 and a guitar, you need this. It feels way more natural and immersive than using a standard learning app like Simply Guitar. The passthrough is excellent for seeing your fingers and the 'note highway' at the same time. Best of all, it’s a one-time price that’s much more affordable than the alternatives. I highly recommend it for any beginner!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, this honestly made our day!  It's great to hear how it feels natural and immersive, and how the app has been helping you. More exercises, songs and features coming soon.

reviews.review_description: This app is really awesome. It reminds me of Rocksmith, but in mixed reality and with hand tracking.There are other reasons why I got this app (low cost), but the main reason  was because of the full custom song support. With this app, I can play my massive Rocksmith library in mixed reality at my speed. I don't have to worry about subscriptions, playing music that I don't like, or even having to use another screen to play period. It is nice and refreshing to just put my headset on and within a minute, I am up and jamming anywhere. I don't have to spend my time staring at a tiny screen, I can focus on my guitar. The developers are very active on the Discord. They listen to their audience and regularly push out new updates and improvements to the app. Get this app. You won't be disappointed.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the awesome review! We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying IMMERROCK and that playing your songs feels easy and fun. More exercises, songs, and improvements coming soon, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
It's helping me a lot. I'm a beginner. Fabulous format with adjustable settings for a customised fret. And lovely celebration when you finish a lesson. 

 Would be good if you could skip through some of the lessons that are too easy... Such as using three minutes to practice putting four fingers down on a string in one direction, three minutes the other direction, three minutes both directions etc. Cannot skip the lesson and mark it as completed. I understand that's to help strengthen fingers though. 

It's confusing writing the fret number coming as it intuitively should represent finger number, but once you get used to it, it's good. 

Controller free hands operation is a bit glitchy. 

 Otherwise it's really fabulous.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! We'll take your comments into account for future updates!

Maybe the app can communicate it better, but for exercises you find to be too easy/simple, you can always adjust the settings to make the BPM faster or the note duration shorter, too challenge your skills more.

If you have a method to connect your guitar with a cable or mini interface, the objectives to the exercises are more dynamic and based on hitting certain combos, rather than being time based.

reviews.review_description: I don't like this game it was not good and I want a refund but it won't let me I haven't played more than 2 hours and I haven't had it more than 14 days why can't i get my money

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear about your experience. Refunds are handled directly by the Meta Quest store, and based on what you described, you should be eligible. Please request it through your purchase history in the Meta Quest app or website.  https://www.meta.com/en-gb/help/quest/828412189021014/

reviews.review_description: Been using this to learn bass guitar and its making my journey so easy and fun. Everything about it is easy to use. Being able to just focus on the app with the guitar is helpful. Great for people of all ages who want to get started playing guitar of any description.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the awesome review! We're really happy to hear IMMERROCK is making your bass journey easier and more fun. 🎸
We’re excited to bring you even more good stuff!

reviews.review_description:
I love that it got me started. I was learning piano using vr and thought why not guitar. I learned guitar and used this app to help build a momentum. 

However, after I ventured out and stumbled across other learning apps, this one imo  has a long way to go. Again, this is fun, it’s VR and guitar, but I’ve found apps not using Vr more fun and better designed than this one that have better songs and ways of using acoustics and electric g. They have subscriptions vs this one time fee. 

3 stars for being good enough to get someone started. I’ll add more stars if the platform is better in many ways(better songs to learn, ways to focus on sections of songs, different ways to learn the songs etc…
Ist nix

developer_response.body:
Wir entschuldigen uns für die Unannehmlichkeiten. Wir haben die App getestet und sie startet auf Quest 3, Quest 3s und Quest Pro. Bitte kontaktieren Sie uns unter evanna@immerrock.com, damit wir Ihnen weiterhelfen können.

-----

Sorry for the inconvenience. We've tested the app and it does launch on Quest 3, Quest 3s and Quest Pro. Please reach out to evanna@immerrock.com so we can help you further.

reviews.review_description: I learned everything from this app, I wish there was more songs but other than that it's amazing.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! We’re really glad you’re enjoying IMMERROCK. More exercises, songs, and features coming soon, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Great way to mix up your practice and learn at the same time.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re glad you’re enjoying and learning with IMMERROCK. More exercises, songs, and improvement coming soon, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I do know how to play some easy chords but I've never actually played using the fret board and finger picking. I've just started on my journey and did my 1st hour of practice. The tutorial is top notch, I feel as if I've learned so much. Building finger positioning  memory is key. Love it and hopefully the software will get bigger and even better. Brilliant.

reviews.review_title: Fun, good for learning and affordable
reviews.review_description:
This App is GENIOUS. I am actually learning to play the guitar, and it's a lot of fun. You can add custom songs to the headset, and the community on their Discord server is great. You honestly can't spend your money better anywhere else! There isn't a subscription, which is really refreshing these days, and the price doesn't compare to even one private guitar lesson. 

I'm sure there will be many updates to come, improving this app even further, as the creators are really engaged with their community, and are always looking to make this experience better. 

If you are looking for some ways to use your VR headset productively, or just have fun and learn the guitar, look no further.

reviews.review_title: If you are an intermediate guitarist
reviews.review_description: You probably won't get much out of it. The concept is great i hope they become the vr Rocksmith. I understand it's early access and i bought it mostly to support. Please keep it going 👍👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support. We just launched Note Detection, it is compatible with the RealTone cable using a USB-C adapter. We continue working to make IMMERROCK the best guitar app available.

reviews.review_description: Love the game. Devs did a great job. Note detection works really well even though it’s in beta. Good tool to help learn songs.

I sat down to practice a simple riff, and ended up spending hours learning multiple songs. The ease of slowing down a section and playing at your own pace is extremely useful. The note highways are clear and mixed reality is a perfect fit. I can't wait for my next session!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We are so  glad to hear you’re enjoying IMMERROCK! 🎸 Stay tuned for coming updates!

reviews.review_description: Hi which is the right phono to USB C cable?

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. There are multiple options to connect the guitar to  IMMERROCK. You can use a Real Tone cable with a USB-C adapter. You can also use a generic 1/4 in TS to USB-C cable with headphones. Or a small audio interface such as Fender Mustang Micro, or the Boss Katana Go.

reviews.review_description: The actual gameplay is quite nice, once you've gotten it set up. Unfortunately the only options for menu controls are very shoddy hand tracking.not optimal.

developer_response.body: We are happy to say that IMMERROCK now has Touch controller support. We hope you check it out.

reviews.review_title: This will be a good help.
reviews.review_description: I just bought my first guitar ever, starting from zero, and this will help me a lot, awesome app, looking forward to future updates. I hope there will be more custom songs because it seems really hard to do your own custom songs. I also hope you will add more songs and awesome tools for us beginners. Pm me for a fresh ref.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! You can join our Discord for support and help for your custom songs. Stay tuned, new updates are coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
I acknowledge that this is an early access version and recognize its potential; however, I believe it is currently only for a very specific people. 

Lessons and songs are limited, and almost every song's backing track is so off, as if it were microtonal music. Even in the backing tracks that I can play on tune, the harmonization seems oddly composed to my ears.I wonder why this particular point has not been addressed in the reviews. Am I missing something?😢
I suppose it's played by midi data and don't seem to understand what is going on. 


I understand that adding a feature may be challenging, but it would be beneficial if there were a function to assess my guitar playing, as it currently appears to be lacking. Perhaps my expectations are too high.


I initially wanted to rate this app three stars, but seeing that many others have rated it five stars, I felt compelled to balance the ratings.

developer_response.body:
EDIT 2025 Aug 08: We just release the Note Detection feature, we hope you check it out.

Thanks for the feedback! We are disappointed the early access app hasn't met your expectations yet.  We are currently working on implementing more features and content to make IMMERROCK the BEST guitar app.

reviews.review_description:
Perfect for beginners/intermediate/professionals

As an absolute beginner, this is the most effective way to learn guitar! I didn’t realize I purchased a self paced, no subscription, complete guitar lesson! 

Features I love so far:

-Replay-able lessons (to learn or improve picking, strumming, chords, memorizing, comfort)

-Complete customization(slow down/speed up songs, pause/reverse songs, movable fret board, etc)

-Custom Song support(learn your favorite songs on guitar!)

-Satisfying results: Playing along with the virtual fret board, guitar hero style, makes me want to keep playing and playing. 

-Daily Streak (a great way to show off how much time you put into practicing)

-So much more

This “game” isn’t just for people with guitar experience. It is a great way to get started with learning guitar. You are saving so much money by not buying guitar lessons or subscriptions from other companies. This is a great game for skilled guitar players as well to keep up and practice certain skills. 

If you are optimistic and have been wanting to try and learn guitar for a while now, get this game! As a complete beginner, you will be comfortably playing happy birthday within an hour!

developer_response.body:
Wow! Thank you so much for your amazing review! 🤩 We’re so excited to hear how much you’re loving IMMERROCK, especially as a beginner. That’s exactly what we were hoping for, a fun, no-pressure way to learn guitar at your own pace! 
Stay tunned for more updates and keep rocking!  🎸

reviews.review_description: It's a great thing, especially when someone is just starting their adventure with the guitar. For people who have learned to play with tabs so far, they need to get used to the new form of notation. Once you've mastered the basics, it's a lot of fun. Of course, we're waiting for new songs. Maybe something from the classic rock and rock'n'roll.

developer_response.body: thank you very much for the review! We are working on more content! Keep an eye out for news soon :) Did you know you can also find custom songs on the Discord server?

reviews.review_description: Hey, I’m and intermediate  player. enjoying the app so far. The one thing I would like to see is for it to let me know when I miss something. Like scoring on accuracy.  Not sure if that is something you are working on for future updates.   But this is a great start

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We are glad you are enjoying the app. We are working on new updates!

reviews.review_description:
Im amazed and so excited to keep working with it! I’m a beginner, just got a new guitar and haven’t really learned anything on my own or with other learning apps (Justin Guitar, Gibson, YouTube, etc)
I love the sequencing of learning with this, the color coded strings, the looping play with speed changes, and especially piecing together the parts of songs until you feel comfortable playing the full song at the end. Thank you for making this app!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We are currently working on more updates that we hope you enjoy soon, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: If you're a learning guitarist, this app is awesome! it's early days but I can SEE the potential, I'm really looking forward to the growth of this app.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We hope you keep enjoying IMMERROCK, stay tuned for more updates soon.

reviews.review_title: Fun and Engaging Way to Learn Guitar in
reviews.review_description: ImmerRock is a great way to practice and learn guitar in a fun, interactive way. The app does a great job of making playing feel natural, and the immersive environment keeps it engaging. Whether you're a beginner or just looking to sharpen your skills, it's a solid tool for improving your technique while having fun.

developer_response.body: Hey Purplecrane, thank you so much for your kind words! We hope you can crush your goals with your guitar using IMMERROCK! Stay tuned for more updates!

reviews.review_description: If you're a beginner or simply looking to level up your guitar skills, this app is an absolute game-changer. The immersive experience of seeing the fretboard in virtual reality, while notes flow down a gorgeous highway-style interface toward you, makes learning and practicing feel like playing a fun, interactive game. There are plenty of songs to practice with, and more are being added regularly. The developers are guitarists themselves, so they understand the features you need, and there are plenty to explore. I highly recommend this app.

developer_response.body: Hey vod4u, thank you so much for your kind words! I'm glad you are enjoying the app, and we'll definitely keep working to add more features.

reviews.review_description: I recently bought a guitar and have tried a few different ways of learning, pre ordered this and installed it today been enjoying it and found it the best way to learn that I have tried so far. Looking forward to working my way through it and the enhancements to come.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We're so glad it's helping you out! We are working on more improvements and content!

reviews.review_description:
Couldn’t believe how quickly I was able to jump in and actually play guitar.

Scales would be wonderful. Also a “Repeat” song button so I can continue playing instead of having to manually replay the song.

Keep rockin!

developer_response.body: Hey BLClark19! 🎸 Thanks for the review! We’re glad you're enjoying the app. Great suggestions, we’ll keep them in mind for future updates. Keep rockin’! 🤘🔥

reviews.review_description: Great for anyone wanting to learn guitar. Very active dev who openly seeks feedback. Excited to see where it goes!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! We are always available in Discord for feedback and suggestions! Keep rocking!

reviews.review_description: Very easy to get grasp of the app. Good way to learn guitar

developer_response.body: Hey srikars! Thank you for your support, we are glad you are enjoying the app!

reviews.review_description:
Its cool concept  but It'll be much better is we can make sure we are hitting the right notes. 
Maybe. Using midi cable or sound recognition  🤔        something like what piano vision did 
And if you incorporate bass instrument  fantastic!!!!    Lol just shouting out ideas
And to finish it up. Do game like guitar hero  as extra 😎 😜    this will be 20$ game  and you get  million downloads

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review. We are working on note recognition, and hope to be able to share more about it's progress later. Bass is also on the roadmap.

reviews.review_title: Exciting chance to learn the guitar
reviews.review_description: I am starting with my first instrument and this has so far been a great experience. I really think if I put in the time I am going to see great results. Plus being able to add in your own song is huge.

developer_response.body: Hey Txlonghornsrule! Thank you for your review and your kind words. Keep practicing, and we can’t wait to see your guitar progress!

reviews.review_description:
Well done to the team. This is awesome and look forward to seeing what this becomes. Very happy that I ended up getting this 👍
With a few more tweeks, this can be a 5 star easily

developer_response.body: Hey MrFuzzyEh! Thanks for your kind words! We are glad you are enjoying the app, stay tunned for more updates to reach 5 stars! 🤩

reviews.review_description: This app has made very fast progress in the past couple of weeks.  I look forward to seeing how Immerrock continues to evolve, especially with custom user content.

developer_response.body: Hey Raynebc! Thank you so much for your kind words, custom songs are now much easier thanks to Editor on Fire!

reviews.review_description: It’s a nice app to learn how to play guitar on your own. Worth it.

reviews.review_title: I Like, but it's no ROCKSMITH
reviews.review_description: I bought it because its guitar app on vr I have rocksmith 2014 on 360 @ the remastered on xbox series x.hopefully it be like that soon

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the feedback! Can't wait to show you more as we keep building, we are working on making IMMERROCK the BEST guitar app.

reviews.review_title: A great way to learn guitar!
reviews.review_description: If you want to learn guitar, this is the app for you!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We're glad you are enjoy it.

reviews.review_description: Really well made app, with a bunch of potential! Excited to see how it progresses.
but it's a very early access now

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We are working on more features and content!

reviews.review_description:
For some reason, I actually overlooked the fact that adding custom songs is already possible when I first tested it. I tried it out straight away and am delighted. Keep up the good work! I'm raising my rating to four stars!
--

I think the app has potential, but there is still a lot to do. The tutorial units are quite well done, but I think they could be too difficult for beginners because the level of difficulty increases too quickly. Recognition of the notes played is of course also something that would be nice, if accurate recognition is technically possible at all, even at high playing speeds and fast movements on the fretboard. To be honest, I have some doubts about that.

For me as an advanced guitarist this is no longer so important, but for beginners it definitely is! Personally, however, I would like to have custom song support! That would be great!

And please support the most common languages too!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! We are working on improving the app experience and features constantly.

In the meantime, Custom Song is supported! You can find some in the Discord server
